reference: My dear friend, I think you are having a very tough time currently. Whatever you have described about your problems suggests that you are experiencing a decrease in attention and concentration, along with unusual distractions. You are feeling sad because of all of this. I kindly recommend that you visit a psychiatrist, as you may be experiencing depression, which is easily treatable.
text: My dear friend, I think you are having a very tough time currently. Whatever you have described about your problems suggests that you are experiencing a decrease in attention and concentration, along with unusual distractions. You are feeling sad because of all of this. I kindly recommend that you visit a psychiatrist, as you may be experiencing depression, which is easily treatable.
